title: linaria micrantha
intro: Linaria micrantha, also known as Toadflax or Small Toadflax, is a low-growing, annual or perennial herb native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Linaria micrantha include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and soothe skin irritations. Linaria micrantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
